articles.title: At Least 3 SEC Commissioners Are For ETF Approval Says Bloomberg Analyst
articles.description: Eric Balchunas, a senior ETF analyst for Bloomberg, has stated that at least 3, out of the 5 SEC commissioners, are in favor of approving the bitcoin spot ETFs.

articles.title: XRP Army Bank On A Massive Bull Run As Analyst Foresees Ripple Emerging as Market Leader Amid IPO Rumors
articles.description: The pundit highlighted Ripple's focus on cross-border payments and involvement in helping governments form Central Bank digital currencies as key factors contributing to its potential market leadership.

articles.title: U.S. SEC Will Reject Bitcoin ETF: Matrixport Predicts
articles.description: Matrixport report predicts SEC Bitcoin ETF rejections, causing a drop in Bitcoin price and showing the market's sensitivity to news.

articles.title: Cardano In 2024: Dollar Dream Or Downward Spiral For ADA?
articles.description: After a spectacular climb of over 150% in 2023, Cardano (ADA) has reached a new yearly high, touching a peak of $0.67 for the second time last month. Notably, the increase coincides with an impressive rise in important Cardano ecosystem components, with the leading Decentralized Exchange (DEX) Minswap witnessing an astounding 26,000% gain and drawing a sizable influx of new users. On its...

articles.title: Bitcoin Spot ETF Proposals to Be Rejected by SEC: Matrixport
articles.description: "SEC Chair Gensler is not embracing crypto in the U.S., and it might even be a very long shot to expect that he would vote to approve bitcoin spot ETFs," Matrixport said.

articles.title: SEC will reject all bitcoin spot ETFs in January, says Matrixport analyst
articles.description: Analyst Markus Thielen argued the applications still fall short of a critical requirement that must be met before the SEC can approve them.

articles.title: Matrixport Knew the Drop in Bitcoin! Here is that report
articles.description: In its latest report, Matrixport claimed that the SEC will reject all Bitcoin spot ETFs in January and BTC could fall to $38,000. Continue Reading: Matrixport Knew the Drop in Bitcoin! Here is that report

articles.title: There was a sudden drop in Bitcoin (BTC) price! What is the reason for the decline?
articles.description: Bitcoin (BTC) fell sharply to $42,242. What is the source of the decline? Will the SEC approve Bitcoin ETFs? Continue Reading: There was a sudden drop in Bitcoin (BTC) price! What is the reason for the decline?
